[{'text': 'The robot is at (11.21, 9.75). Looking at the map coordinates:
- Start: (3.98, 7.87) - in the middle white corridor
- Destination: (11.51, 13.67) - in the upper white corridor
- Current: (11.21, 9.75) - appears to be in the black wall between corridors

The Y coordinate of 9.75 is between the middle corridor (around Y=7.87) and the upper corridor (around Y=13.67). The black wall seems to span from about Y=8.5 to Y=12.5 based on the map image.

I need to find a vertical passage. Looking at the map image, there seems to be a narrow vertical passage on the right side of the map. Let me try to navigate to the right edge and find a passage going up.

Let me try rotating to face upward and try to find a passage.', 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_017W5SjxJ9hpRrLwGu56k8Hn', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'angle_degrees': 90}, 'name': 'rotate', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
